en.metaTitle: Hsin-Hsin Yuan | Documentary Director & AI-Language Creative
en.metaDescription: International portfolio of Hsin-Hsin Yuan, a documentary director, cross-cultural storyteller, and AI-language creative.
en.name: Hsin-Hsin Yuan
en.heroEyebrow: Documentary direction for artists, culture, and technology stories
en.heroSubcopy: I direct and develop documentary stories for artists, culture, and technology teams working across Taiwan and international contexts. I help complex subjects become human, cinematic, and clear enough to travel.
en.availabilityIntro: I can enter a project early as a story partner, direct the shoot, shape the edit, or build repeatable editorial workflows for short-form factual content.
en.watchShelfAria: Selected works with public video links
en.labSubcopy: A working space for fact-checked bilingual script workflows, short-form factual series, language judgment, and AI-assisted editorial systems.
en.archiveSubcopy: Earlier television, scripted, factual, and international collaboration work with platform performance and funding context.
en.createSubcopy: The clearest fit is work that needs cultural fluency, documentary listening, bilingual judgment, and a director who can turn complex material into human stories.

services.title: For Artists & Cultural Institutions
services.line: Documentary portraits, artist interviews, cultural programs, and international audience translation.

services.title: For Documentary / Factual Producers
services.line: Research-led story development, interview direction, field production, and cross-cultural coordination.

services.title: For Tech & Brand Teams
services.line: Founder stories, explainers, branded factual shorts, and human-centered technology narratives.

services.title: For AI-Language / Editorial Teams
services.line: Fact-checked bilingual scripts, tone judgment, language learning formats, and repeatable editorial workflows.

en.contactTitle: Let’s build a story with signal.
en.contactSubcopy: For documentary, cultural, branded, AI-language, and cross-cultural production collaborations. Send a brief note about the project, timeline, and what kind of partner you need.

contactForm.name: Name
contactForm.success: Thank you. Your note has been sent.
contactForm.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

zh.metaTitle: 袁欣欣 | 紀錄片導演與 AI 語言創作者
zh.metaDescription: 袁欣欣的國際作品集：紀錄片導演、跨文化創作者、AI 語言與創作流程實驗者。
zh.name: 袁欣欣
zh.heroEyebrow: 為藝術、文化、科技與人的故事做紀錄片導演與敘事開發
heroRoleLines: 紀錄片導演 / 編劇 / 製作人
zh.heroSubcopy: 我為藝術家、文化單位、科技團隊與跨國製作開發並執導紀錄片故事，讓複雜題目變得有人、有畫面，也能被不同語境的觀眾理解。
zh.availabilityIntro: 我可以在前期作為故事夥伴加入，也可以擔任導演、剪輯，或替團隊建立可重複使用的紀實短影音與編輯流程。
zh.watchShelfAria: 有公開影片連結的代表作品
zh.labSubcopy: 放置資料驗證型雙語劇本、知識短影音系列、語言判斷與 AI 輔助編輯系統的工作空間。
zh.archiveSubcopy: 整理早期電視、戲劇、科學節目、國際合作與具平台成績的作品。
zh.createSubcopy: 最適合的合作，是需要文化理解、紀錄片式聆聽、雙語判斷，以及把複雜材料整理成人的故事的專案。

services.title: 藝術家與文化單位
services.line: 藝術家肖像、訪談紀錄、文化節目，以及面向國際觀眾的語境轉譯。

services.title: 紀實製作人與節目團隊
services.line: 研究導向的故事開發、訪談導演、現場製作與跨文化協調。

services.title: 科技與品牌團隊
services.line: 創辦人故事、知識型短影音、品牌紀實，以及以人為核心的科技敘事。

services.title: AI 語言與編輯團隊
services.line: 資料驗證型雙語劇本、語氣判斷、語言學習格式與可重複的編輯工作流。

zh.contactTitle: 一起做一個有訊號的故事。
zh.contactSubcopy: 紀錄片、文化內容、品牌短影音、AI 語言與跨文化製作合作洽詢。來信可以簡單說明專案、時程，以及你需要哪一種合作角色。

contactForm.name: 姓名
contactForm.error: 送出時發生問題，請稍後再試。
